mac-display.purpose: Hero headlines in Mac day mode. Chicago bitmap font, large and bold.

mac-body.purpose: Body text in Mac mode. Geneva bitmap sans at 14px.

next-display.purpose: Hero headlines in NeXT night mode. Smooth Helvetica, bold, tight tracking.

next-body.purpose: Body text in NeXT mode. Smooth Helvetica at 14px, same size as Mac but anti-aliased.

shadows.name: mac-window
shadows.purpose: Original Mac window shadow. Window-level containers in Mac mode only.

motion.name: theme-switch
motion.purpose: Theme toggle transition. 150ms ease-out for all property changes.

motion.name: cursor-blink
motion.purpose: Terminal cursor blink. 1s step function, instant on/off.

components.name: Mac Primary Button
components.description: Action button in Mac day mode. Ink fill, paper text, sharp corners, flat border.
components.css: .ds-mac-btn-primary { background: #2a1a0e; color: #faf8f3; padding: 8px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 0; font-family: 'Geneva', 'Chicago', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), color 120ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-mac-btn-primary:hover { background: #ffb000; color: #2a1a0e; } .ds-mac-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ffb000; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: NeXT Primary Button
components.description: Action button in NeXT night mode. Raised 3D bevel, mid-gray fill, sharp corners.
components.css: .ds-next-btn-primary { background: #4a4a4a; color: #d4d4d4; padding: 8px 24px; border: 1px solid; border-color: #666666 #111111 #111111 #666666; border-radius: 0; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-next-btn-primary:hover { background: #6e6e6e; } .ds-next-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #999999; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Mac Card
components.description: Content container in Mac day mode. Warm surface, flat 1px rule border, sharp corners.
components.html:
Feature Title

Description of the feature.
components.css: .ds-mac-card { background: #f5f0e8; border: 1px solid #d4c9b0; border-radius: 0; padding: 16px; box-shadow: none; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-mac-card:hover { border-color: #ffb000; } .ds-mac-card-title { font-family: 'Geneva', 'Chicago', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #2a1a0e; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-mac-card-body { font-family: 'Geneva', 'Chicago', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #5e503b; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; }

components.name: NeXT Card
components.description: Content container in NeXT night mode. Dark surface with raised 3D bevel, sharp corners.
components.html:
Feature Title

Description in smooth grayscale.
components.css: .ds-next-card { background: #2d2d2d; border: 1px solid; border-color: #666666 #111111 #111111 #666666; border-radius: 0; padding: 16px; box-shadow: none; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-next-card:hover { border-color: #888888 #222222 #222222 #888888; } .ds-next-card-title { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #d4d4d4; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-next-card-body { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #999999; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; }

components.name: Mac Navigation
components.description: Fixed top nav in Mac day mode. Warm surface, flat 1px border bottom.
components.html: Home Architecture
components.css: .ds-mac-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: #f5f0e8; border-bottom: 1px solid #d4c9b0; padding: 0 16px; height: 40px; position: fixed; top: 0; width: 100%; z-index: 50; box-shadow: none; } .ds-mac-nav-link { font-family: 'Geneva', 'Chicago', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #5e503b; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 0; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-mac-nav-link:hover { background: #e8dfd0; } .ds-mac-nav-link.active { color: #2a1a0e; }

components.name: NeXT Navigation
components.description: Fixed top nav in NeXT night mode. Dark surface with raised bevel bottom edge.
components.html: Home Architecture
components.css: .ds-next-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: #2d2d2d; border-bottom: 1px solid; border-color: #666666 #111111 #111111 #666666; padding: 0 16px; height: 40px; position: fixed; top: 0; width: 100%; z-index: 50; box-shadow: none; } .ds-next-nav-link { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #999999; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 0; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-next-nav-link:hover { background: #3a3a3a; } .ds-next-nav-link.active { color: #d4d4d4; }

components.name: Mac Table
components.description: Comparison table in Mac mode. Flat 1px borders, rule-color header.
components.html:
MetricBeforeAfter
SetupHoursOne afternoon
components.css: .ds-mac-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; border: 1px solid #d4c9b0; border-radius: 0; font-family: 'Geneva', 'Chicago', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-mac-table th { background: #d4c9b0; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #5e503b; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; text-align: left; padding: 6px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #b8a88a; } .ds-mac-table-row { border-bottom: 1px solid #d4c9b0; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-mac-table-row:hover { background: #f5f0e8; } .ds-mac-table-td { font-size: 14px; color: #2a1a0e; padding: 8px 16px; } .ds-mac-table-td-pos { font-size: 14px; color: #339933; font-weight: 600; padding: 8px 16px; } .ds-mac-table-td-neg { font-size: 14px; color: #cc3333; padding: 8px 16px; }

components.name: NeXT Table
components.description: Comparison table in NeXT mode. Raised bevel header, pure grayscale.
components.html:
MetricBeforeAfter
SetupHoursOne afternoon
components.css: .ds-next-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; border: 1px solid; border-color: #666666 #111111 #111111 #666666; border-radius: 0; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-next-table th { background: #4a4a4a; border: 1px solid; border-color: #666666 #111111 #111111 #666666; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #999999; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; text-align: left; padding: 6px 16px; } .ds-next-table-row { border-bottom: 1px solid #2d2d2d; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-next-table-row:hover { background: #2d2d2d; } .ds-next-table-td { font-size: 14px; color: #d4d4d4; padding: 8px 16px; } .ds-next-table-td-pos { font-size: 14px; color: #55aa55; padding: 8px 16px; } .ds-next-table-td-neg { font-size: 14px; color: #aa4444; padding: 8px 16px; }

components.name: Mac Terminal Widget
components.description: Terminal emulator in Mac mode. Paper background, horizontal-line title bar, window shadow.
components.html:
terminal

> Ready.
components.css: .ds-mac-terminal { background: #faf8f3; border: 1px solid #2a1a0e; border-radius: 0; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 1px 1px 0 #2a1a0e; } .ds-mac-terminal-bar { background: repeating-linear-gradient(to bottom, #d4c9b0 0px, #d4c9b0 1px, #e8dfd0 1px, #e8dfd0 2px); padding: 8px 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid #2a1a0e; } .ds-mac-terminal-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-block; border: 1px solid #5e503b; } .ds-mac-terminal-bar-title { font-family: 'Geneva', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: #5e503b; margin-left: 8px; } .ds-mac-terminal-body { padding: 16px; font-family: 'Monaco', 'VT323', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.4; color: #5e503b; } .ds-mac-prompt { color: #ffb000; margin-right: 8px; }

components.name: NeXT Terminal Widget
components.description: Terminal emulator in NeXT mode. Sunken bevel, no title bar dots, Courier New.
components.css: .ds-next-terminal { background: #1a1a1a; border: 1px solid; border-color: #111111 #666666 #666666 #111111; border-radius: 0; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: none; } .ds-next-terminal-bar { background: #4a4a4a; border-bottom: 1px solid; border-color: #666666 #111111 #111111 #666666; padding: 4px 12px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #999999; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-next-terminal-body { padding: 16px; font-family: 'Courier New', Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.4; color: #d4d4d4; } .ds-next-prompt { color: #6e6e6e; margin-right: 8px; }

narrative.overview:
This design system inhabits two eras from the same lineage. Day mode speaks the visual language of the 1984 Macintosh: paper-white surfaces, 1px black borders, Chicago bitmap type, offset drop shadows, and zero border-radius. Night mode transforms into NeXTSTEP (1988): dark gray surfaces, 3D beveled edges, smooth anti-aliased Helvetica, pure grayscale palette, and the same strict rectangular geometry. The theme toggle is not dark/light. It is a shift between two computing revolutions from the same visionary.

The two modes share the same DNA (Steve Jobs created both Mac and NeXT) but express it differently. Mac mode is warm, approachable, bitmap-textured. NeXT mode is cool, precise, beveled. Both reject modern web conventions. No rounded corners, no gradient text, no floating card shadows, no hero metrics.
keyCharacteristics: Dual personality: Mac System 1 (day) and NeXTSTEP (night). Not dark mode but a shift between two computing eras from the same lineage.
Zero border-radius everywhere. Neither the 1984 Mac nor the 1988 NeXT had curves.
Flat 1px borders in Mac mode. 3D beveled edges in NeXT mode. The border strategy IS the mode signal.
Bitmap fonts (Chicago, Geneva) in Mac mode. Anti-aliased Helvetica in NeXT mode.
One accent color in Mac mode: amber gold under 10%. No accent in NeXT mode: pure grayscale.
Comparison tables as the canonical content format.
Offset drop shadows (1px 1px 0) for Mac windows only. NeXT uses bevels instead of shadows.

rules.name: The Dual Era Rule
rules.body: Day mode and night mode are not light/dark variants. Mac mode uses warm browns and gold on paper with flat borders. NeXT mode uses pure grayscale on dark surfaces with 3D bevels. Do not blend them.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Mac mode gets amber gold on max 10% of viewport. NeXT mode gets zero accent colors. The bevel is the emphasis.

rules.name: The Era Fidelity Rule
rules.body: Mac mode uses bitmap Chicago/Geneva. NeXT mode uses smooth Helvetica. The font is the strongest era signal.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Mac surfaces are flat with 1px borders. Shadows only on window-level containers.

rules.name: The Bevel-Is-Elevation Rule
rules.body: Every NeXT surface has a bevel. Raised for protruding elements, sunken for recessed. If a NeXT element has no bevel, it is wrong.

dos: Do use 1px flat borders in Mac mode. Every container has a border.
Do use 3D beveled edges in NeXT mode. Raised and sunken bevels carry all emphasis.
Do use zero border-radius on every element.
Do alternate section backgrounds for visual rhythm.
Do use bitmap fonts in Mac mode, smooth Helvetica in NeXT mode.
Do use comparison tables as the primary content format.
Do keep Mac accent gold under 10% of viewport.
Do keep NeXT mode pure grayscale. No chromatic color.
donts: Don't use glassmorphism or backdrop blur.
Don't use side-stripe borders greater than 1px.
Don't apply box-shadow to cards or buttons.
Don't use IBM Plex Mono or modern tech sans-serif.
Don't treat night mode as dark mode. It is NeXTSTEP.
Don't introduce chromatic color in NeXT mode.
